records.probe_material: poly(4-vinylpyridine) (P4VP) modified on SWCNTs, with HfO2 passivation layer
records.pH_value: -1 (not a pH sensor, but liquid medium PBS pH 7.2)
records.test_medium: phosphate buffered saline (PBS, 10 mM, pH 7.2) / aqueous solvent
records.selectivity: The sensor distinguishes Cu2+ from Na+, K+, Cd2+, Hg2+, Mn2+, Mg2+, Cr2+, and Fe2+. Only Cu2+ produces strong signal response.
records.reusability: Can be washed with acetic acid and deionized water for reuse more than 70 times.
records.storage_stability: After storage in sealed box at room temperature for six weeks, current response decreased only 5% to 2 nmol L−1 Cu2+.
records.response_time: Not explicitly stated, but real-time current changes shown (I–t curves).
records.measurement_condition: Gate voltage Vg = 5 V (positive) and Vds = 0.5 V; also tested negative Vg.
records.additional_information: The sensor uses SWCNT-FET with HfO2 high-k dielectric layer; sensitivity enhancement due to HfO2 (100× higher than SiO2). LOD 33 pM, sensitivity 7.9 μA μM−1.
